name: Pasta with Sun-Dried Mullet Roe

ingredients.item: bottarga (sun-dried mullet roe), membrane removed, shaved or very finely grated

method: Serves 4–6 500 g spaghetti 190 ml good-quality virgin olive oil 10 anchovy fillets in oil, drained 50 g fresh breadcrumbs 2 tablespoons baby capers in brine, drained ½ bunch flat-leaf parsley, chopped ½ bunch fresh mint, chopped 20 cherry tomatoes, halved 100 g bottarga (sun-dried mullet roe), membrane removed, shaved or very finely grated salt and ground black pepper
Boil the spaghetti in plenty of salted water.
